titlestmt.titleproper: St. Pauls Episcopal Church of Havana records6084
titlestmt.author: Compiled by M.M.

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-01-12 18:21:35 -0500.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: St. Pauls Episcopal Church of Havana records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: St. Paul\'s Episcopal Church of Havana (Montour Falls, N.Y.)

did.abstract: Two volumes of parish registers (1847-1918, 1848-1888), one volume of vestry meeting minutes (1856-1938), and miscellaneous papers including two affidavits certifying baptisms.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: In 1853 the Episcopalians in Havana commenced construction of a church which was consecrated in 1871. The church society elected vestrymen and wardens on April 10, 1856 and incorporated on June 28th of the same year. Charles Cook was the main benefactor of the church, as the donated the lot for the church and $12,000 for its construction.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Records contain two volumes of parish registers (item #1: 1847-1918 and item #2: 1848-1888), one volume of vestry meeting minutes (item #3: 1856-1938), and miscellaneous papers (no dates) including two affidavits certifying baptisms, a letter from the widow of Rev. D. Willers, and two pamphlets of the "Gospel Messenger," vol. IX, no. XV, and vol. IX, no. 50.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: St. Paul's Episcopal Church of Havana records, #6084. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.geogname: Schuyler County (N.Y.) -- Religious life and customs.
controlaccess.subject: Churches, Anglican.
Church records and registers -- New York (State) -- Montour Falls.
Episcopal Church -- New York (State) -- Montour Falls.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 246 pages numbered on alternate pages. ".5" is used to represent the unnumbered pages.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Statement of commencement of records, and names of wardens and vestrymen, 1847.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of communicants, 1848-1854.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Chronological records, 1847-1866. including records of annual elections of wardens and vestrymen, deaths, confirmations, baptisms, communions, weddings, invitations extended for the pastoral charge of the church, and church collections.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of communicants, 1883-1916.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of marriages including date, place of marriage, and witnesses, 1915-1917

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of communicants, 1854-1882.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of baptisms, 1846-1856 - information given varies.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Confirmations, 1848-1854.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of baptisms, 1856.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Missing from volume.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of marriages including only the couple's name and place of residence, 1849-1854.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of burials including date, age, and occasional mention of place of service, 1848-1868.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Lists of wardens and vestrymen, 1847-1858.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of collections including date, occasion, reason for collection, and amount collected, 1847-1851.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Diagram of church with ownership of pews shown.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of baptisms including birthdates, names of parents, and names of sponsors, 1858-1868.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of wardens and vestry, 1866-1869.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of burials including name, date, age, and place of death, 1904-1918.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of confirmations including names of visiting bishops and rectors who presented those being confirmed, 1907-1915.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of baptisms including names of parents, sponsors, date, and place of baptism, 1908-1913.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of confirmations including date, name of rector presenting those being confirmed and sometimes the name of the bishop, 1856-1904

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of marriages including place of residence, place of ceremony and date, 1854-1914.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of baptisms including place of baptism, parent's names, sponsors' names, date, 1869-1871.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of offerings, 1856-1858.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Lists of baptisms; information given varies, 1872-1881.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of teachers and members of Bible class, 1848.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Account of the origin of the church, 1852-1859.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Records of wardens and vestrymen elected, 1867-1869.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Lish of parishioners including date, residence, and remarks, 1867-1906.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Lists of baptisms including date, parents, sponsors, birthdate, officiating clergyman, and remarks, 1856-1919.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Lists of confirmations including date, officiating bishop, and remarks, 1856-1919.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Lists of communicants - information given varies, 1855-1900.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of marriages including generally the date, place of marriage, officiating clergyman, witnesses, and remarks, 1856-1917.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Lists of burials including date, time of death, age, place of interment, and officiating clergyman, 1856-1919.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of offerings including object, remarks, and amount, 1855-1888.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The Vestry Minutes include: a brief history of the church; a copy of the church's deed; an account of incorporation; decisions about pew rents; salaries of officiating clergymen; elections of wardens and vestrymen; payments of debts; a series of letters published in the Havana Journal concerning a misunderstanding between P.S. Ruth and the vestrymen (in particular, Charles Cook); letters of resignation, acceptance, and decline of various church positions; tributes to the deceased prominent members of the church, and treasurer's reports.

did.unittitle: Two affidavits or certificates of baptisms, the first undated and unsigned, the second signed and undated.
Letter [July 14, ?], Mrs. [Downs] to Rev. Mr. McGinnis, re: the birth and death dates of an individual.
Newspaper clippings from the "Gospel Messenger," vol. IX, no. XV, and vol. IX, no. 50.
